sentences.original: I am Captain Hastings.
My friend is Hercule Poirot.

sentences.text: El este un detectiv foarte bun.
sentences.original: He is a very good detective.

sentences.text: Într-o zi, o femeie vine la noi.
sentences.original: One day, a woman comes to us.
She is Mary Marvell.

sentences.text: Ea este o actriță de film cunoscută.
sentences.original: She is a famous film actress.

sentences.text: Soțul ei, Gregory Rolf, este și el actor.
sentences.translationRu: Её муж, Грегори Рольф, тоже актёр.
sentences.original: Her husband, Gregory Rolf, is also an actor.
I have a problem, she says.

sentences.translationRu: — У меня есть очень большой бриллиант.
sentences.original: I have a very big diamond.
It is called the Western Star.
My husband gave it to me.

sentences.text: — Dar am primit scrisori ciudate, spune ea.
sentences.translationRu: — Но я получила странные письма, — говорит она.
sentences.original: But I have received strange letters, she says.
Someone wants my diamond.
Poirot reads a letter.

sentences.text: — Diamantul este ochiul unui idol din China, scrie acolo.
sentences.translationRu: — Бриллиант — это глаз идола из Китая, — написано там.
sentences.original: The diamond is the eye of an idol in China, it says.
You must return the diamond.

sentences.text: — Un chinez va veni să-l ia, spune Mary.
sentences.translationRu: — Придёт китаец, чтобы забрать его, — говорит Мэри.
sentences.original: A Chinaman will come to take it, Mary says.
I am afraid. What should I do?
Poirot smiles calmly.
Do not be afraid, madame.
Keep the diamond safe.
Mary Marvell leaves.

sentences.text: — Ceva este ciudat aici, spune Poirot.
sentences.original: Something is strange here, Poirot says.

sentences.text: A doua zi vine altă femeie.
sentences.translationRu: На следующий день приходит другая женщина.
sentences.original: The next day another woman comes.

sentences.text: Ea este lady Yardly, o doamnă nobilă.
sentences.original: She is Lady Yardly, a noble lady.
She looks worried.

sentences.text: — Și eu am un diamant mare, spune ea.
sentences.translationRu: — У меня тоже есть большой бриллиант, — говорит она.
sentences.original: I also have a big diamond, she says.
It is called the Star of the East.

sentences.text: — Și eu am primit scrisori despre un chinez.
sentences.translationRu: — Я тоже получила письма про китайца.
sentences.original: I too have received letters about a Chinaman.
Poirot listens carefully.

sentences.text: — Două diamante, aceeași poveste, spune el.
sentences.translationRu: — Два бриллианта, одна и та же история, — говорит он.
sentences.original: Two diamonds, the same story, he says.
Very interesting.

sentences.text: Lady Yardly ne invită la casa ei de la țară.
sentences.translationRu: Леди Ярдли приглашает нас в свой загородный дом.
sentences.original: Lady Yardly invites us to her country house.
The house is called Yardly Chase.
Poirot accepts the invitation.
We go to Yardly Chase.
The house is old and beautiful.
Lord Yardly receives us.

sentences.text: Seara, lady Yardly poartă diamantul la gât.
sentences.translationRu: Вечером леди Ярдли надевает бриллиант на шею.
sentences.original: In the evening, Lady Yardly wears the diamond on her neck.
The diamond shines beautifully.
We are all sitting in the drawing room.
Suddenly, the lights go out.

sentences.text: Camera este întunecată și lady Yardly țipă.
sentences.translationRu: В комнате темно, и леди Ярдли кричит.
sentences.original: The room is dark and Lady Yardly screams.
Someone comes in through the window.
He looks like a Chinaman.

sentences.text: El apucă diamantul și fuge repede.
sentences.translationRu: Он хватает бриллиант и быстро убегает.
sentences.original: He grabs the diamond and runs away quickly.
The lights come on again.
The diamond is gone!

sentences.text: Lady Yardly plânge și toți sunt șocați.
sentences.translationRu: Леди Ярдли плачет, и все потрясены.
sentences.original: Lady Yardly cries and everyone is shocked.
But Poirot is calm.

sentences.text: — Nu vă faceți griji, spune el.
sentences.original: Do not worry, he says.
I know the truth.
Poirot gathers us all.

sentences.text: — Povestea cu chinezul nu este adevărată, spune el.
sentences.translationRu: — История про китайца неправда, — говорит он.
sentences.original: The story about the Chinaman is not true, he says.

sentences.text: — Nu există două diamante, spune Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: — Никаких двух бриллиантов нет, — говорит Пуаро.
sentences.original: There are not two diamonds, Poirot says.
There is only one.

sentences.translationRu: — Обе «звезды» — это один и тот же камень.
sentences.original: The two Stars are the same stone.
Everyone is amazed.
How is it possible? the lord asks.
I will explain, Poirot says.

sentences.text: — Lady Yardly avea nevoie de bani.
sentences.original: Lady Yardly needed money.

sentences.text: — Ea a vândut diamantul în secret lui Gregory Rolf.
sentences.translationRu: — Она тайно продала бриллиант Грегори Рольфу.
sentences.original: She sold the diamond in secret to Gregory Rolf.

sentences.text: — Rolf este soțul lui Mary Marvell, spune Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: — Рольф — муж Мэри Марвелл, — говорит Пуаро.
sentences.original: Rolf is the husband of Mary Marvell, Poirot says.

sentences.text: — El a dat piatra soției sale.
sentences.original: He gave the stone to his wife.
And he called it the Western Star.

sentences.text: — Dar era un pericol, spune Poirot.
sentences.original: But there was a danger, Poirot says.
People could recognize the stone.

sentences.text: — Deci Rolf a inventat povestea cu chinezul.
sentences.translationRu: — Поэтому Рольф придумал историю про китайца.
sentences.original: So Rolf invented the story of the Chinaman.

sentences.text: — El a scris singur toate scrisorile.
sentences.original: He wrote all the letters himself.

sentences.text: — Și chinezul de astă-seară? întreabă lordul.
sentences.translationRu: — А китаец сегодня вечером? — спрашивает лорд.
sentences.original: And the Chinaman this evening? the lord asks.

sentences.text: — Acela a fost Rolf, spune Poirot.
sentences.original: That was Rolf, Poirot says.

sentences.text: — El s-a deghizat în chinez și a luat piatra.
sentences.translationRu: — Он переоделся китайцем и забрал камень.
sentences.original: He disguised himself as a Chinaman and took the stone.

sentences.text: — Acum are din nou propria lui piatră, spune Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: — Теперь у него снова его собственный камень, — говорит Пуаро.
sentences.original: Now he has his own stone again, Poirot says.

sentences.text: — El credea că nimeni nu va ști adevărul.
sentences.translationRu: — Он думал, что никто не узнает правды.
sentences.original: He thought no one would know the truth.
But Hercule Poirot sees everything.

sentences.text: Lady Yardly lasă capul în jos.
sentences.original: Lady Yardly lowers her head.
It is true, she says quietly.

sentences.text: — Aveam nevoie de bani și mi-a fost frică.
sentences.translationRu: — Мне нужны были деньги, и мне было страшно.
sentences.original: I needed money and I was afraid.

sentences.text: Lordul Yardly își ia soția de mână.
sentences.translationRu: Лорд Ярдли берёт жену за руку.
sentences.original: Lord Yardly takes his wife's hand.

sentences.text: — Acum totul este bine, spune el.
sentences.original: Now everything is fine, he says.
We will solve everything together.

sentences.text: Mai târziu, Poirot și cu mine plecăm acasă.
sentences.translationRu: Позже мы с Пуаро уезжаем домой.
sentences.original: Later, Poirot and I go home.

sentences.text: — Cum ai ghicit? îl întreb eu.
sentences.original: How did you guess? I ask him.

sentences.text: — Două diamante cu aceeași poveste de chinez, spune Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: — Два бриллианта с одной и той же историей про китайца, — говорит Пуаро.
sentences.original: Two diamonds with the same Chinaman story, Poirot says.

sentences.text: — Era prea mult pentru o coincidență.
sentences.original: It was too much for a coincidence.

sentences.text: — De aceea m-am gândit la o singură piatră.
sentences.translationRu: — Поэтому я подумал об одном камне.
sentences.original: That is why I thought of a single stone.
I smile.

sentences.text: Prietenul meu este cu adevărat genial.
sentences.original: My friend is truly brilliant.
